class.help: Mantiene los distintos Seniorities que hay.
class.label: Seniority
class.name: SENIORITY

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_seniority as oi_seniority, t0.c_seniority as c_seniority, t0.d_seniority as d_seniority, t0.l_profesional as l_profesional, SEC.policy, t0.c_seniority as CODE, t0.d_seniority as TEXT FROM POS04_SENIORITY as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Seniority.SENIORITY\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_seniority LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_seniority asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_seniority as oi_seniority, SEC.policy FROM POS04_SENIORITY as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Seniority.SENIORITY\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_seniority LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_seniority asc')/ROWS/ROW

attribute.description: Código de AFJP. Puede ser alfanumérico de hasta 30 caracteres.
attribute.label: Código
attribute.name: c_seniority

attribute.description: Descripción de AFJP. Puede ser alfanumérico de hasta 100 caracteres.
attribute.label: Descripción
attribute.name: d_seniority

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Seniority.SENIORITY.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.Seniority.SENIORITY.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(POS04_SENIORITY.oi_seniority) as CNT from POS04_SENIORITY Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and POS04_SENIORITY.oi_seniority={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(POS04_SENIORITY.d_seniority,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(POS04_SENIORITY.c_seniority,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
